hypothesis: If EfficientNet-B0 pretrained on a data-rich additive-free SEM dataset is fine-tuned on a small additive-induced SEM dataset using targeted oversampling, then it will achieve higher class-wise accuracy and F1 score across the nine NCM composition–aging classes than models trained from scratch, pretrained-only models, or models fine-tuned using weighted loss without oversampling, because pretraining captures transferable morphological features that generalize to additive-induced samples.
